consulting.title: Advisory & Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Select engagements in agent infrastructure, deterministic state, and machine-native commerce.
consulting.pageDesc: Mark Hendrickson offers select advisory and consulting in AI agent systems, deterministic state infrastructure, and machine-native commerce.

context.heading: Context
paragraphs: I take on a small number of consulting engagements in areas where I have deep, current, hands-on expertise. Each engagement is chosen for technical overlap with the infrastructure problems I work on daily.

My background spans nearly two decades across consumer web, developer platforms, and crypto infrastructure: writing and shipping at TechCrunch, co-founding Plancast, leading user experience at Hiro for the Stacks blockchain, and running Leather at Trust Machines. I now build Neotoma, a structured memory layer for AI agents, and operate with a full agentic stack where AI agents function as collaborators rather than tools.

items.title: Agent Systems & AI Infrastructure
items.description: Architecture and reliability for AI systems that take actions, maintain state, and evolve over time.
topics: Tool-using LLM systems and agent runtimes
Debugging reliability problems in agent execution

items.title: Deterministic State & Knowledge Architecture
items.description: Systems where correctness, traceability, and reproducibility of state are critical.

items.title: Machine-Native Commerce
items.description: Programmable payment infrastructure for autonomous software agents.
topics: Programmable settlement and API-native payment flows
Infrastructure enabling autonomous services to transact

items.title: Architecture Review
items.description: Focused analysis of system architecture, identifying structural weaknesses, reliability risks, and opportunities.

items.title: Technical Advisory
items.description: Ongoing advisory providing architectural guidance and strategic technical input.

items.title: System Debugging & Reliability
items.description: Diagnosing complex failures in AI systems, automation pipelines, or distributed systems.

items.title: Platform & Infrastructure Design
items.description: Advising on the architecture of new platforms involving agents, workflows, or programmable infrastructure.

bestFit.heading: Best Fit
traits: Technically ambitious systems at the infrastructure level
Teams with strong engineering who need architectural perspective
Problems involving state evolution, reproducibility, or complex automation
Willingness to explore unconventional architectural approaches

workingStructure.heading: Working Structure
bullets: 5-10 hours per week, defined scope and timeline
Fixed-scope projects, architecture sprints, or monthly retainers
No embedded team participation or day-to-day engineering roles

openSourceCommitment.heading: Open-Source Commitment
paragraphs: Neotoma is developed as open infrastructure. Engagements must allow continued development of Neotoma, reuse of general architectural ideas, and publication of open-source work.
Client-specific work stays confidential. Engagements requiring exclusivity over core architectural concepts or restricting open-source development are not accepted.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.paragraph: If you think your project may be a good fit, I would be happy to discuss it.
include: A short description of the system you are building
The technical challenges you are encountering
The type of engagement you have in mind
